meta.draftNote: Draft assembled 2026-05-24 by merging three sources: (1) portfolio at https://portfolio-poc-web.vercel.app — per-section JS chunks for current self-positioning; (2) ~/Downloads/Sysdev-Bulaquena-DaveCharmB.pdf (1).pdf — May 2024 student-era CV with education + certifications + capstone + hackathons; (3) ~/Downloads/Bulaquena, Dave Charm - Solutions Designer - As of November 2024.docx — Stratpoint-issued profile with detailed Clear Minds product breakdowns. Conflicts resolved in favor of the source contemporaneous with the period described. Story 2.1 extensions (`tags`, `highImpact`) populated where source data justified it. Review, edit, then copy over canonical-cv.json when ready.

basics.name: Dave Charm Bulaquena
basics.label: Full Stack Developer & Solutions Designer
basics.summary: Full Stack Developer and Solutions Designer who bridges technical implementation and user-centered design. Currently in Stratpoint's Architecture & Governance team architecting scalable enterprise applications and supporting pre-sales. Prior depth in cross-platform mobile (React Native, Flutter, native Android/Java) on production fintech and retail apps, with a track record of shipping user-facing features, killing crash-class bugs, and modernizing codebases. Comfortable shipping end-to-end on solo projects — from Arduino capstone hardware to LLM-tooling pipelines.

work.name: Stratpoint Global Outsourcing Inc.
work.summary: Architecture and Governance Team — architecting scalable enterprise applications and supporting pre-sales for new enterprise clients.
highlights: Architect scalable enterprise applications leveraging modern frameworks and cloud-native technologies to meet complex client requirements.
Craft technical proposals, system blueprints, and integration strategies for pre-sales — directly influencing deal closures and onboarding of new enterprise clients.
Bridge technical feasibility with business value, ensuring alignment between stakeholder goals and system capabilities.

work.name: Clearminds Algorithmic Incorporated (Universal Storefront Service Corporation)
work.summary: Cross-platform mobile developer shipping features across financial-services and retail products — USSC Super Service App, USSC Business Solution (UBS Pay1st), and Go Salads POS.
highlights: USSC Super Service App (consumer remittance/bills-payment/prepaid app, nationwide): engineered cross-platform enhancements in React Native, optimizing performance and iOS/Android compatibility.
USSC Super Service App: full refactor of the bank remittance transfer feature, achieving faster transactions and smoother user interactions.
USSC Super Service App: crafted a new transaction interface that simplified the flow and made financial transactions more intuitive for end users.
USSC Super Service App: diagnosed and eliminated a crash-class bug affecting a subset of users, materially improving app stability.
USSC Super Service App: modernized the codebase against the latest React Native practices, raising maintainability and future-proofing the product.
USSC Business Solution (UBS Pay1st, B2B international payments app, 800+ U-Store network): upgraded the project to the latest Expo SDK, unlocking new platform features and improved performance.
USSC Business Solution: designed and implemented the transaction flow and payment-processing UI, enhancing UX and shortening transaction steps.
USSC Business Solution: integrated core-service APIs enabling real-time data exchange between app and backend.

Go Salads POS (in-store point-of-sale + inventory + sales-insights app): provided critical production support; resolved a connectivity bug affecting lower-version Android devices, broadening device-stability coverage.

work.name: Stratpoint Global Outsourcing Inc.
work.summary: Cross-platform mobile internship — contributed to Wookie, Stratpoint's internal workspace-booking app, while completing intensive bootcamps on Scrum, Git, DevOps, QA, and Flutter.
highlights: Wookie (internal workspace-booking app for reserving workstations and scheduling events): contributed feature work that streamlined the booking workflow and improved user experience.
Wookie: collaborated cross-functionally to ensure seamless integration with other Stratpoint internal systems.
Wookie: built robust, maintainable code applying Flutter, Dart, Domain-Driven Design architecture, database management, and API integration.
Engaged in code reviews and testing within an Agile/Scrum workflow on YouTrack — upheld code-quality standards on a team-shipped product.
Completed intensive bootcamps on Scrum, Git, DevOps, QA, and Flutter (basic-to-advanced) during the internship period.

work.name: Coromar Group of Companies
work.summary: Remote frontend contributor on a reservation product — built the front-office web app, a React Native mobile prototype, and site design/prototypes.
highlights: Worked remotely with developers and project managers to deliver modules for a Reservation Website.
Built the front-office reservation application using Next.js and TypeScript.
Prototyped a React Native mobile application for a Coromar Tech client.
Designed and prototyped the company-facing website.

projects.name: jobhunter (this project)
projects.description: Solo-developer pipeline that ingests pasted job descriptions, tailors a CV + cover letter via a single LLM call, and runs three drift checks (fabrication, content-loss, keyword-stuffing) before notifying the author.
highlights: Walking-skeleton-first delivery: every epic gates on a runnable end-to-end pipeline rather than a tower of unintegrated modules.
Filesystem-only persistence in v1 — no DB — with per-application output slugs under ./out/<slug>/.
Drift checks treat the canonical CV as the source of truth; failures hold the package silently rather than spamming notifications.

projects.name: Wookie — Workspace Booking App (Stratpoint internal)
projects.description: Internal tool for reserving workstations and scheduling events, with real-time availability and integration into Stratpoint's internal systems. Cross-platform Flutter app built during the Stratpoint internship.
highlights: Implemented feature work that streamlined the booking workflow and improved overall user experience.
Built on a Domain-Driven Design architecture for maintainability, with Supabase / Firebase backing and YouTrack-driven Agile/Scrum delivery.
Engaged in code reviews and testing to uphold quality standards on a team-shipped internal product.

projects.name: ChatterBox — Real-time Messaging App
projects.description: Real-time messaging app built during Stratpoint training, applying BLoC state management, DDD architecture, and Firebase-backed auth and messaging.
highlights: Implemented real-time message delivery, user authentication, and presence indicators.
Applied DDD principles for scalable, maintainable architecture.
Used BLoC for state management and GetIt for dependency injection.

projects.name: Moviology — Movie Discovery App
projects.description: Flutter movie-discovery app integrating a third-party REST API to fetch titles, ratings, posters, and metadata, with Riverpod-managed state and a DDD-organized codebase.
highlights: Integrated a third-party REST API (RapidAPI) to fetch and display movie data with search support.
Used Riverpod for efficient state management and a DDD-aligned codebase for maintainability.

projects.name: Remote-Controlled Robotic Toy Car (BSIT Capstone)
projects.description: Capstone project: an Arduino-driven robotic toy car integrated with a precision robotic arm for detecting and collecting lightweight materials from the ground.
highlights: Served as Lead Programmer and Project Manager — owned project timelines and QA compliance through to defense.
Implemented object detection, material-pickup mechanisms, automation controls, and the operator-facing Android control app.
Demonstrated end-to-end problem-solving across embedded firmware (Arduino/C++) and mobile UI (Android).

projects.name: PNP ITMS Hackathon 2022 — Champion
projects.description: Hackathon-winning web+mobile solution built for the PNP Information Technology Management Service. Led ideation, development, and pitch to PNP panelists.
highlights: Spearheaded ideation and proposed the winning strategic solution for the PNP ITMS Hackathon problem statement.
Led development of the web + mobile prototype using ReactJS, Android, and Firebase.
Presented and pitched the solution to PNP panelists, communicating both technical depth and business value.

projects.name: AIA Hackathon 2022 — Finalist
projects.description: Finalist team for the BPI AIA hackathon at BGC Taguig — built a web-based prototype addressing the competition's theme problem.
highlights: Brainstormed and converged on a solution for the BPI AIA hackathon theme.
Developed a web-based competition prototype in ReactJS + Firebase.
Presented and defended the solution to the panelist Q&A.

awards.title: PNP ITMS Hackathon 2022 Champion

awards.title: CodeChallenge.io Philippine Code Challenge Champion (Student Category)
